chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَا يَجِبُ مِنْ ذِكْرِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فِي كُلِّ مَجْلِسٍ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 21 – What is Obligated from the Mention of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic in every gathering

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/127)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/127)
text: قَالَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ يَا ابْنَ آدَمَ اذْكُرْنِي فِي مَلَإٍ أَذْكُرْكَ فِي مَلَإٍ خَيْرٍ مِنْ مَلَئِكَ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Ibn Fazzal, from Ghalib Bin Usman, from Bashir Al Dahhan,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic Said: “O son of Adam<sup>as</sup>! Mention Me<sup>azwj</sup> in a gathering, I<sup>azwj</sup> shall Mention you in a gathering better than your gathering’.
en.sarwar: 12. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from ibn Faddal from Ghalib ibn ‘Uthman from Bashir al-Dahhan from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Holy, has said, ‘O sons of Adam, speak of Me in public, I will speak of you in a public that is better than your public.’”
